payload.title: newtype! ergonomic helper for R0017
payload.description:
Follow-on from RT-67. R0017 tells agents to wrap same-typed params in distinct newtypes; this makes that a one-liner so the fix isn't tedious.

Provide a 'newtype!' declarative macro (in trust-std, #[macro_export] #[strict::macros_ok]) and/or a derive that generates: struct Name(pub Inner); + new()/From/Deref, with Copy only when Inner: Copy. Invoking trust_std::newtype! does NOT trip R0008 (the visitor only flags macro_rules! DEFINITIONS, not invocations). Wire it into R0017's help text once it exists.

Watch scope: keep it a thin declarative macro; don't grow a proc-macro framework.
